translations.en: JDoris
translations.note: SIDENT name (J prefix is opcode marker)

translations.en: a stunningly beautiful young woman.
The woman never looks up from the book she's reading, even when you speak to her.
translations.zh: 彼女目不離卷，縱汝啟齒，亦不抬眼。

translations.en: "Yes, what do you want
now?"
"My name's Doris, but you can just call me '@Hey @you.'"
translations.zh: 「我叫桃莉絲，不過你叫我『@Hey（喂） @you（你）』也行。」

translations.en: "Everyone else does."
"Typical," she mutters.
"I'm in charge of the Tinker's Inn while my @father's away."
translations.zh: 「家@father（父）外出時，工匠客棧由我代為打理。」

translations.en: "If you have any complaint, no matter how trivial, please feel free to bother me."
translations.zh: 「若有任何不滿，無論多瑣碎，儘管來煩我。」

translations.en: It doesn't really sound like she means what she said.
translations.zh: 聽她語氣，不像真心如此。

translations.en: "Room and board's 5 gold per night per person, cash in advance."
translations.zh: 「食宿每人每晚五金，預先付清。」

translations.en: "Interested?"
"Yes, that's what they all say."
"My father called me back from the @Lycaeum so that he could go fight the gargoyles."
translations.zh: 「家父自@Lycaeum（學院）召我回來，自己卻去打魔像族了。」

translations.en: "Yes, I'm learning the mystic arts from the great @Xiao."
translations.zh: 「對，我師從偉大的@Xiao（蕭學）習奧術。」

translations.en: "Though I doubt you'd know much about that sort of thing."
translations.zh: 「不過汝這等人，諒也不懂此道。」

translations.en: "She is the wisest mage in all Britannia."
translations.zh: 「她乃全不列顛尼亞最睿智之法師。」

translations.en: "Only she can teach the spells of the greatest @power."
translations.zh: 「唯她能傳授@power（威力）最強之咒語。」

translations.en: "Mmm-hmm, that's right."
"Mmm-hmmm," she mutters as you leave.
"Oh really?"
"Hmm, fascinating," she yawns.
"What a pity."
"No pay, no stay. 5 gold, cash in advance."
"No pay, no stay."
"#1 gold for the lot of you, cash in advance."
translations.zh: 「汝一行人共需 #1 金，預先付清。」

translations.en: Your party takes up a collection to pay for the rooms.
Putting all thoughts of the rude innkeeper out of your mind, you drift off into a pleasant sleep.
translations.zh: 汝將那無禮店主之事拋於腦後，安然入眠。

translations.en: The next morning, Doris sullenly serves you breakfast and then returns to her studies.
translations.zh: 翌晨，桃莉絲悻悻然為汝供早膳，旋即回去苦讀。

translator_notes: Doris = 米諾克工匠客棧老闆 Patrick 之女。態度傲慢，看不起客人，學徒於 Xiao。語氣設定：刻意輕蔑、敷衍。
